states.name: Rashanar
states.title: The Burning Hunger
states.description: The Rashanar, unlike other dragons of Erden, cannot reproduce. Rahaneer are the result of a single prehistoric event. Most fell into slumber upon this strange, magical birth, but some have awakened at separate times across the millenia. While individual Rashanar have personalities, every single one shares a hunger for fire and a want for devastation.

states.name: Rashanar
states.title: The Burning Hunger
states.description: Rashanar temperament makes them incredibly dangerous, but in the hands of a master trainer, they can be harnessed as an amazing force for good. In multiple Pandemoniums throughout history, Crestbearers fought alongside trained Rashanar.

states.name: Rashanar
states.title: The Burning Hunger
states.description: The greatest of the Rashanar are said to be indistinguishable from gods. They're practically unstoppable, and can lay waste to massive areas on a whim. For this reason, many in Erden see untrained Rashanar as utmost threats, and devote unparalleled resources to their destruction.
